name: dev-team-agents
description: A coordinated dev team for Claude Code. 12 specialist agents (Orchestrator, Analyst, Architect, Developer, Developer-Opus, QA, Reviewer, Debugger, DevOps, Git, Doc-keeper, developer-parallel) plus meta-agent, communicating via a file bus under .claude-team/. Includes 7 enforcement hooks (architecture-readiness, review gate, file ownership, token budget) and 15 methodology skills. Built on stable subagents — no experimental features.
